entities.name: SEED BUSINESS MANAGEMENT TOOL
entities.description: A tool developed to help small-scale seed companies generate financial projections and support decision-making.

entities.name: IOWA STATE UNIVERSITY
entities.description: An institution that co-developed the Seed Business Management Tool.

entities.name: INTERNATIONAL CROPS RESEARCH INSTITUTE FOR THE SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: An institution that co-developed the Seed Business Management Tool.

entities.name: SMALL-SCALE SEED COMPANIES
entities.description: The target users for whom the Seed Business Management Tool was developed.

entities.name: FINANCIAL PROJECTIONS
entities.description: Projections generated by the tool to support the creation of a business plan.

entities.name: BUSINESS PLAN
entities.description: A plan supported by the generation of financial projections.

entities.name: INCOME STATEMENT
entities.description: A financial document generated by the Seed Business Management Tool.

entities.name: BALANCE SHEET
entities.description: A financial document generated by the Seed Business Management Tool to show financial position.

entities.name: DECISION-MAKING
entities.description: The process supported by the tool through parameter adjustment and outcome calculation.

entities.name: PRODUCTION
entities.description: An outcome calculated by the tool based on changed business parameters.

entities.name: PROFITABILITY
entities.description: An outcome calculated by the tool based on changed business parameters.
